title: How a Man of God Stays Humble When He's Winning
caption:
Nobody struggles with humility when things are falling apart. The test comes when things start going right.

What do you have that you did not receive? (1 Corinthians 4:7)

Every win was on loan. Here's how to stay low while you're actually winning.

#faith #christianmen #humility #manofgod #godlymen #discipline
